title: Book Nook
desc: A personal library management web application designed to organize, track, and catalog your book collection seamlessly.

title: DM Screen
desc: A Java-powered tool built for tabletop Dungeon Masters to manage campaign logistics, NPC states, and game flow on the fly.

title: Project ARDO
desc: A dark fantasy C# RPG framework utilizing WinForms and SQLite persistence. Implements robust object-oriented patterns in a command-driven terminal style.

title: Soccer Challenge
desc: An interactive, physics-driven gameplay module developed inside the Unity Game Engine showcasing real-time asset optimization.
